name: "Gaze of the Temple"
description: A rare collectible displayed in the display cases of the Temple of Space. Certain patterns seem to be etched upon its surface, though their meaning remains enigmatic and all but indecipherable....\nThe treasures resting within these display cases seem to hold fragments of the past in quiet suspension. They wait patiently for later visitors to pause and gaze upon them, so that the long-forgotten stories they carry may slowly stir back to life...
